problem id: 6adef1ef
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) XOR SHL(7)

examples:
  01111000 -> 00011110
  01010011 -> 01010100
  10110100 -> 00101101
  10010100 -> 00100101
  01111110 -> 10011111
  00011011 -> 01000110
  10010111 -> 01100101
  00011100 -> 00000111

query: 11110101
predicted answer: 11111101
